description: Storm parameters governing PhiStorm trigger conditions, duration, and coalition bonuses
trigger_description: Minimum coalition size to trigger a PhiStorm event (Fibonacci-34)
shadow_cutoff_description: Coalitions below this size receive no storm benefits (Fibonacci-13)
storm_seed_description: Duration scaling divisor — extra epochs = (pulse - trigger) / storm_seed (Fibonacci-21)
pool_base_description: Base reward pool size for a triggered storm (Fibonacci-21)
pool_scale_description: Additional pool units per coalition member above trigger threshold (Fibonacci-13)
coalition_bonus_description: Bonus multiplier applied to all participants in a triggered storm (phi^-3)
storm_rules: A PhiStorm triggers when coalition_size >= trigger (34)
Coalitions with size < shadow_cutoff (13) are in shadow zone and receive zero storm payout
Coalitions with 13 <= size < 34 receive scaled pre-storm benefits at ratio (size - 13) / (34 - 13)
Storm duration extends by 1 epoch for every 8 members above trigger
Pool formula: pool_base + pool_scale * (coalition_size - trigger) for size > trigger
All storm participants receive coalition_bonus (0.236) as additive multiplier on their payout
Storm payout is distributed proportionally by contribution score within the coalition
Only stations S11, S13, S17, S19 can host storm events
A station may host at most one storm per epoch

storm_states.BUILDING: Coalition size between shadow_cutoff and trigger
storm_states.DISSIPATING: Storm ending, final payouts being computed
